title: onosma subsericea
intro: Onosma subsericea, also known as silky onosma, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onosma subsericea include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Onosma subsericea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves can be dried and used in medicinal formulations.
